creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Daniel,
We are making a push to eliminate interactive ports.  Yours (hunch) obviously has a listed maintainer but it hasn't been updated in 9 years.

Can we:
1) deprecate and eliminate it
2) Convert it to a regular port

If neither, can you explain why this has to be interactive and why it deserves a place in the tree even though no packages are being built for it because of it's interactive nature?

Thanks,
John
